title.en: Ye Tian knew about this, but he didn't stop it,...

content.en:
When Ye Tian stabilized the realm, the Heavenly Emperor Palace began to use the power of the forbidden realm to arrange a large array, providing the coordinates here, and attracting the arrival of the Vast Sea Ancestor.

Ye Tian knew about this, but he didn't stop it, because there was no need.

Maybe there is a contradiction between the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain, but Ye Tian will not completely destroy the Heavenly Emperor Palace, once it can't be extinct, even if there are only a few people left, these people will not be able to attract the arrival of the Vast Sea Ancestor?

Moreover, the Wind Mountain Lord of Black Wind Mountain will also lead his own body to arrive, once the Wind Mountain Lord and a large number of half-step domain ancestors and Dao ancestors of Black Wind Mountain arrive across the dark forbidden domain, who dares to be sure that the vast sea area ancestor will not secretly follow?

Therefore, in Ye Tian's calculations, the arrival of the Vast Sea Ancestor was inevitable.

Therefore, there is no need for him to kill the people of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, that would be tantamount to completely becoming an enemy of the Vast Sea Ancestor, which would bring a lot of trouble to the human world.

There is no need to do something, he will not do it, it will not do him any good, and it will not make any sense.

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master and others opened the big arrays one after another, lest Ye Tianhui would come to sabotage their plans.

Although these big arrays couldn't stop Ye Tian, if they had these big arrays, they would be a little more at ease.

But their worries were unnecessary, and Ye Tian did not come to attack them.

"Positioning the big array, is it arranged?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord asked.

"It's set!"

The main road of the Thunder Tribulation Palace.

"Then open the Great Array and lead the Mighty Sea Ancestor to arrive!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord said in anticipation.

"Yes!"

Many palace masters nodded a little.

Bang!!!!!

Under the opening of the positioning array, the power of the forbidden realm emitted an invisible light, instantly crossing the boundless dark forbidden realm of the vast sea, and spreading to the divine heaven realm where it did not know where it was.

At the same time, the Wind Mountain Lord also used the power of the Forbidden Realm to cast a special large array, hooking up his own body and providing coordinate information.

-----------------

Divine Realm.

In the midst of a ruin, a scarred figure suddenly looked at the Dark Forbidden Realm.

If the Dragon Shadow Palace Master was present, he would have recognized that this person was the Ancestor of the Great Sea.

The Vast Sea Ancestor has been hunted down for a long time, and he has been in a desperate situation again and again, but he has survived, and now his strength is much stronger than at the beginning, and he is already at the elite Domain Ancestor level.

In addition, he possessed the Life-Saving Domain Technique and an extremely precious life-saving treasure, so he was chased and killed by an elite Domain Ancestor.

As for the top domain ancestors who were high above, they didn't attack him.

Because those top domain ancestors knew that if he died, the supreme treasure that could make people break through to the level of the strongest domain ancestor would disappear completely.

Therefore, those people will not let him die, and naturally they will not do it to him personally.

Now.

"Finally sensed the formation arranged by the Dragon Shadow, it seems that they have found a new realm, and they have also created a forbidden realm, the forbidden realm was born, and that treasure is probably about to grow!"

The Mighty Sea Ancestor muttered.

He didn't heal his wounds, but immediately escaped into the Dark Forbidden Realm, and crossed towards the Daoshan Realm.

Those elite domain ancestors were still chasing him, so he didn't want to waste time, and it was the right decision to enter the Dark Forbidden Realm and get rid of them as soon as possible.

However, when the Vast Sea Ancestor entered the Dark Forbidden Domain and continued to go deeper, some elite Domain Ancestors also followed suit.

But as they went deeper and deeper into the Dark Forbidden Realm, danger followed, and some Elite Domain Ancestors did not dare to take the risk and returned directly to the Divine Heaven Realm.

However, there are still some elite domain ancestors who secretly follow the vast sea ancestors.

After all, when the Vast Sea Ancestor was not in a desperate situation, he actually went deep into the Dark Forbidden Domain, what does this mean?

It is very likely that the Vast Sea Ancestor will go to the place where the fragments of the domain realm are located in the first place, and soon after, all the people of the Black Wind Mountain also poured into the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the entire force was moved away, although they were very hidden, they were still discovered.

Most of the forces in the Divine Heaven Realm were indifferent, it was impossible for them to venture into the Dark Forbidden Realm, let alone without knowing anything.

However, some of the top domain ancestors, whose strength could not be advanced by an inch, ventured into the dark forbidden realm, and continued to go deeper, chasing the Black Wind Mountain and the vast sea ancestors and others.

Of course.

These Domain Ancestors were only a very small part of the Divine Heaven Realm, but for the Dao Mountain Realm, once these Domain Ancestors really succeeded in reaching the Dao Mountain Realm, it would inevitably bring great changes to the situation in the Dao Mountain Realm.

......

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian had been in retreat and cultivating, his realm had already been stabilized, and at this moment, he was constantly taking the Holy Body Fruit, refining the Holy Body, and constantly comprehending the Golden Silk Holy Technique, and his strength was steadily improving.

When the Holy Body Fruit was almost consumed, Ye Tian entered the Battle Realm Tower and went to the Battle Gate to apply for the Holy Body Fruit.

And just like that, millions of years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's Eternal Immortal Holy Body had not yet reached the Dacheng realm, but the Golden Silk Holy Technique had been upgraded to the Dacheng realm.

What a terrifying thing this is the culmination of a holy skill!

And that's the effect of the Holy Endowment!

But if you want to raise the holy technique to the consummation realm, the difficulty has increased more than a hundred times, even if you let Ye Tian cultivate for 100 million years, you can't do it.

Therefore, Ye Tian temporarily stopped cultivating the Golden Silk Holy Technique, and instead focused on cultivating the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, and by the way, cultivating the fusion of the Forbidden Dao and the Flesh Dao.

Due to the fact that there is a million-fold time array in the Battle Realm Tower, the speed at which Ye Tian swallows the Holy Body Fruit to refine and improve the Holy Body is not slow, and on this day, among the massive Holy Body Fruits, Ye Tian's Eternal Immortal Holy Body has broken through.

Rumble!!!!!

The aura of the eternal immortal body that far surpassed the small level burst out, if it weren't for the large array covering his retreat, otherwise his aura would have been enough to permeate the entire battle realm.

The eternal immortal holy body broke through, and the holy technique was small.

It can be said that Ye Tian's current strength is afraid that it has surpassed the category of elite domain ancestors, which is comparable to some weaker top domain ancestors.

Of course, the top domain ancestor here refers to the top domain ancestor in the realm, not the top domain ancestor of the dark forbidden domain.

Returning to the One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, spanning ordinary Domain Ancestors, elite Domain Ancestors, comparable to the top Domain Ancestors, what a demonic strength this is!

Moreover, Ye Tian had not yet reached the consummation realm of the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and his strength could still be improved a little.
